detection.threshold_calibration_note: Strong pattern hits (explicit override/exfil phrasing) score 0.9 and close the gate without an LLM call. Weak hits (suspicion markers near imperative verbs, delimiter tags, long base64 blobs) score 0.5 — below close_threshold — and escalate to the evaluator when escalation.enabled is true. Clean content never calls the model.

data_egress.note: On escalation, only a sanitized, length-capped excerpt of the ingested content is sent to the evaluator model. Set escalation.enabled=false to disable all egress — warden then relies on the deterministic pattern floor alone (zero network, zero egress, weaker coverage of novel phrasing).
